Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Kai]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — Kai is a white-haired man who carries a doll named Caela.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — Kai is a Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — Kai's name is Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — Kai is a white-haired swordsman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — Kai carries a blade so long it nearly scrapes the far wall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — Kai possesses a sword named Azura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — Kai is a Traveler who has a student named Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — Kai possesses dolls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Kai has a large, expensive, and dimly lit bedroom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Kai is capable of killing a shadow man while asleep.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Kai is Simon's master.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Kai has white hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 9''' — Kai refused the Eldest's deal because he fears power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 9''' — Kai taught Simon a complex sword pattern.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 10''' — Kai is able to swing a seven-foot piece of steel easily.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 10''' — Kai is someone who does not tell Simon anything.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — Kai is a student of Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Kai has white bangs that cover his eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Kai has a mark on the back of his hand consisting of a single link of chain written in shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — Kai has the ability to let his sword go without it vanishing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Erastes' sword moves are compared to Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Simon has experience sparring with Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Kai is a person who spoke to Simon about the sacrifices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Kai had twisted Simon's wrist a hundred times.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Kai was a person who used to hug and stroke the hair of Otoku and Caela.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — Kai is an individual associated with the young one Manyu mentions.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Kai can call upon stone and steel powers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Kai can call upon the Valinhall armory to manifest weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Kai is someone Simon compares himself to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Kai is a dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Kai has a scimitar in the Valinhall armory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Kai possesses a war-hammer made of Tartarus steel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Kai can call stone to create a shield over his skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Kai is a member of the House.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Kai uses a war-hammer in combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Kai uses Benson's steel for defense.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Kai uses steel-powered legs to enhance his jumping.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Kai can banish his hammer back to Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Kai can open a Valinhall Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Kai uses the Dragon's Fang to open a Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Kai is a character who uses the sword Mithra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Kai was bound by chains that stabbed into his flesh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Simon remembered something Kai said.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — The hummingbird's head motion reminds Simon of Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Kai is Simon's master and has white hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Kai does not have the Nye essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Kai is present and shakes his head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Kai is tasked with protecting the Naraka Incarnation in Malachi's realm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Kai taught Simon a combination attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Kai is an individual Simon has seen perform stances.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Kai is described as having rampant cowardice by the Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Kai once fought Indirial to defend the Wanderer's honor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Kai unexpectedly won a fight against Indirial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Kai was meant to inherit the House.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Kai spent most of his life in the House or the Latari Forest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Kai is a master.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Kai is an apprentice of someone (implied by Talos's address to him, though he is called Master).}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Kai is a teacher of Denner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Kai is present in the scene and being spoken to by Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Kai can summon a huge gleaming hammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Kai was fighting through the middle of the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Master Kai was engaged in combat with the Valinhall Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Kai is dying.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Kai has been irresponsible.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Kai is being executed by the Valinhall Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Master Kai is a white-haired man covered in blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — Kai was dying from a cursed wound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — Kai is a white-haired Traveler who limps and uses a cane.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — Kai suffered a wound from a Ragnarus blade during the fight against the Valinhall Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — Kai retreated deep into the House after being wounded.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 5''' — Kai brushed Caela's hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — Kai is currently trapped and useless.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 8''' — Kai has been living with the dolls for decades.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 8''' — Kai wields a short sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 8''' — Kai was holding the mask at his belt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Kai is treating Valin as if he were the same person.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Kai did not teach Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Kai is a Valinhall Traveler who spends his time talking to dolls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Lycus's mother warned him never to talk to Master Kai without another adult present.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Kai is relaxing by Valinhall's healing pool.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Kai is a full member of the old Dragon Army.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Kai is a Traveler who lives in Valinhall and carries Mithra and a black-haired doll.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Kai wields a gold-and-silver blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Kai was crippled by Ragnarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Kai is a character featured in stories told to Simon by dolls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Kai has not done much in the past two and a half decades.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Kai was once an eccentric genius who radiated potential.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — The current Kai is a broken wreck who wants to play with dolls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Kai is a person who would trade Mithra for Azura if Simon suggested it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Kai has retreated to deep rooms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Kai uses steel by reaching into Benson's basement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 23''' — Kai wears a white-and-gray mask.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 23''' — Kai has a power called the 'iron scroll' or 'black scroll'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 23''' — Kai has black chains around his neck that are nearly complete.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 23''' — Kai uses a weapon called Dragon's Fang.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 23''' — Kai can puff into smoke.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 23''' — Kai is transforming into an Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 23''' — Kai's skin is turning to steel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Kai was transformed halfway into an Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Kai's body was bleeding and transformed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Kai is deceased and has a headstone in the graveyard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Denner is Kai's apprentice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Caela says Simon was better than Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — Kai is dead.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
